lines.english: No one else understands Him, although they may try.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੇ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: karate kee mit na jaanai keea |
lines.english: The created cannot know the extent of the Creator.
He is the Creator Lord of His world.
One who realizes this, comes to taste this state of joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਵਰਤੀਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak jo tis bhaavai so varateea |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, whatever pleases Him comes to pass. ||7||
Gazing upon His wondrous wonder, I am wonder-struck and amazed!
They are the givers, the dispellers of pain.
Following the Guru's Teachings, they receive the four cardinal blessings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਚਿ ਜਨ ਰਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kai rang raach jan rahe |
lines.english: God's humble servants remain absorbed in His Love.
In their company, the world is saved.
The slave of the Lord's servant is so very blessed.
His humble servant sings the Kirtan, the songs of the glory of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਏਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: jan kai sang ek liv laagee |
lines.english: In the company of His servant, one becomes attached to the Love of the One.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਭਿ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹੋਸੀ ਭਿ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hai bhi sach naanak hosee bhi sach |1|
lines.english: True here and now. O Nanak, He shall forever be True. ||1||
True in the beginning, True throughout the ages,
By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, he receives the fruits of his rewards. ||8||16||
His devotional worship is True, and True are those who worship Him.
The Blessing of His Vision is True, and True are those who behold it.
His Lotus Feet are True, and True are those who touch Them.
Ashtapadee:
He Himself is True, and True is all that He sustains.
His Naam is True, and True are those who meditate on it.
He Himself is virtuous goodness, and He Himself is the Bestower of virtue.
Those ears are True, and True are those who listen to His Praises.
The Word of His Shabad is True, and True are those who speak of God.
All is True to one who understands.
O Nanak, True, True is He, the Lord God. ||1||
recognizes the Cause of causes as the Root of all.
One who believes in the Embodiment of Truth with all his heart

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਬਿਸ੍ਵਾਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai ridai bisvaas prabh aaeaa |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with faith in God
the essence of spiritual wisdom is revealed to his mind.
Coming out of fear, he comes to live without fear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਭਿੰਨ ਨ ਕਹਨਾ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kau bhin na kahanaa jaaee |
lines.english: it cannot be said to be separate from it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis te upajiaa tis maeh samaanaa |
lines.english: He is absorbed into the One, from whom he originated.
When something blends with its own,
The servant worships his Lord and Master forever.
Meeting with the Lord, O Nanak, he becomes one with Him. ||2||
This is understood only by one of discerning understanding.
The servant is obedient to his Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur ke sevak kee niramal reet |
lines.english: The servant of the Lord Master lives a pure lifestyle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur ke sevak kai man parateet |
lines.english: The servant of the Lord Master has faith in his mind.
The servant of the Lord Master knows that the Lord is with him.
God is the Cherisher of His servant.
The Formless Lord preserves His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਨਾਮ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kaa sevak naam kai rang |
lines.english: God's servant is attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
He covers the faults of His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਦਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so sevak jis deaa prabh dhaarai |
lines.english: Unto His servant, God bestows His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਮਾਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak so sevak saas saas samaarai |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, that servant remembers Him with each and every breath. ||3||
He surely preserves the honor of His servant.
He blesses His slave with greatness.
He inspires His servant to chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੀ ਆਪਿ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: apane sevak kee aap pat raakhai |
lines.english: He Himself preserves the honor of His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਲਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee gat mit koe na laakhai |
lines.english: No one knows His state and extent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕਉ ਕੋ ਨ ਪਹੂਚੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh ke sevak kau ko na pahoochai |
lines.english: No one is equal to the servant of God.
One whom God applies to His own service, O Nanak

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਊਚ ਤੇ ਊਚੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh ke sevak aooch te aooche |
lines.english: The servant of God is the highest of the high.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak so sevak deh dis pragattaaeaa |4|
lines.english: - that servant is famous in the ten directions. ||4||
it can then reduce the armies of millions to ashes
He infuses His Power into the tiny ant;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਾਸੁ ਨ ਕਾਢਤ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa saas na kaadtat aap |
lines.english: Those whose breath of life He Himself does not take away
